title: Everyday Is a Lullaby
overview: Rektra was once recognized as the most promising and best screenwriter, winning continued success. He could work wherever he wanted to work at any time. However, as time goes by, both his talent and passion for the film seem to fade. He starts to think that making a sensual low-budget horror movie would benefit his life better. In order to overcome the slump, he tries to create an immortal masterpiece of his life inspired by his girlfriend who is an actress. Through her, he meets another woman who has no soul, and continues conversation without sense of time passing by. In the process of getting to know her, he realizes his ultimate passion is ignited
